notes: The official API reference confirms Bearer authentication and POST /v1/chat/completions. Do not expose every models.dev entry in this chat provider: image-generation, embedding and realtime model IDs use other endpoints/protocols. The live /v1/models result and per-model capability metadata should be used to enable only chat-compatible text models.

The current official Sonar endpoint is POST /v1/sonar and accepts Chat Completions-shaped messages. The /v1/models endpoint is primarily the Agent API catalog and returns creator-prefixed IDs; it must not be copied unfiltered into the Sonar selector. The models.dev entries sonar, sonar-pro, sonar-reasoning-pro and sonar-deep-research belong to the Sonar API and should be validated against current Sonar documentation before activation.

There is no universal static inference base URL. SAP requires the deployment-specific DEPLOYMENT_URL, a short-lived OAuth2 client-credentials token, and the AI-Resource-Group header. The current generic API-key-only provider form cannot support this correctly and should mark SAP AI Core unsupported until it implements token acquisition/refresh plus the custom header. Model availability is tenant, region, deployment and entitlement dependent; a models.dev snapshot is not proof that a model is callable. The AI_API_URL is a management API URL and must not be substituted for DEPLOYMENT_URL.

Together officially documents OpenAI compatibility, Bearer authentication, streaming SSE ending in data: [DONE], and GET /v1/models. Filter the model response to chat/language/code models before exposing items in this text-chat UI; image, embedding, moderation and rerank models use different request/response contracts.

The official v0 Model API page documents exactly POST https://api.v0.dev/v1/chat/completions, Bearer V0_API_KEY, OpenAI-compatible streaming, and the three models present in the snapshot. No official model-list endpoint was found, so keep the documented static model IDs and do not invent /v1/models. Access currently requires an eligible paid v0 plan with usage-based billing.

Venice officially documents this base URL, Bearer authentication and OpenAI-style chat completions. Use the models endpoint with type=text (not type=all) for this chat UI. Even among text results, honor model_spec.offline and capability fields, and do not assume every historical models.dev ID is currently online.

Use the direct OpenAI-compatible REST base /v1 in this Python application, not the AI SDK-specific /v1/ai base. External/non-Vercel deployments should use an AI Gateway API key; Vercel-hosted workloads may use OIDC. The catalog contains language, embedding, image, audio and video models, so only entries whose live type is language should appear in this chat-completions selector.

xAI officially documents the OpenAI-compatible REST API and Bearer authentication. The models.dev provider also contains image and video model IDs; those must not be enabled in chat completions. Prefer the authenticated live model list (or /v1/language-models when richer modality metadata is needed) and expose only models with text output supported by the chat endpoint.
